warnings: Do not take if you have ever had an allergic reaction to penicillin-class antibiotics.
Seek medical help if you develop severe diarrhea.
full_label:
DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION: Take 1 tablet (250 mg) every 12 hours.
WARNINGS: Do not take if you have ever had an allergic reaction to penicillin-class antibiotics. Seek medical help if you develop severe diarrhea.
CONTRAINDICATIONS: Allergy to penicillin.
DRUG INTERACTIONS: Probenecid may increase amoxicillin levels.

dosage: Take 1 tablet (200 mg) every 6 to 8 hours as needed for pain.
warnings: Do not exceed 6 tablets in 24 hours.
Stop use and ask a doctor if you experience swelling, shortness of breath, or trouble breathing.
contraindications: Allergy to ibuprofen or other NSAIDs.
interactions: Taking ibuprofen with warfarin may increase the risk of bleeding.
full_label:
DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION: Take 1 tablet (200 mg) every 6 to 8 hours as needed for pain.
WARNINGS: Do not exceed 6 tablets in 24 hours. Stop use and ask a doctor if you experience swelling, shortness of breath, or trouble breathing.
CONTRAINDICATIONS: Allergy to ibuprofen or other NSAIDs.
DRUG INTERACTIONS: Taking ibuprofen with warfarin may increase the risk of bleeding.
